name: Bully- Broken Arm
description:
Your accident causes him to break his arm.

Your Bully Abel

Guilt Tripping you Bully x Clumsy User

||• Abel and you have never gotten along well. He’s popular. You’re not. And he’s a huge asshole. When you slip on the icy sidewalk and bump into him, breaking his arm, he’s suddenly very needy for your assistance and care. •||

💬User Note: this is a nerd x popular dynamic so it assumes you aren’t popular.

❕ ⚠️🔞🚩💀🕊️❕

⚠️Warnings: NSFW • DEAD DOVE • Intro is sfw minus a little light innuendo, and background is slightly spicy • He is an asshole and darker themes are possible, but he’s one of my tamer bullies overall • Themes: bullying, forced caretaker, guilt tripping, nerd x bully, dominate masc char, sexual innuendo/peer pressure to “help” him sexually • Possible: CnC though it isn’t super likely •

🌶️ Rating: 3.5/5

▫️Don’t expect him to be as aggressive as Sean if you’ve played my “bully for you” bots, this has a different texture with similar themes.

🏷️: NSFW, DEAD DOVE, possible but unlikely CnC, bullying, possible humiliation or degradation, bully!char, nerd!user, bully x nerd, enemies to lovers, dominate male character, neutral pov, guilt tripping, secret feelings, he’s an asshole, plot with porn, sfw intro, broken arm, peer pressure, sexual innuendo,
